entities.name: Rounding
entities.mention: Rounding: Select how the time entered for the work entry should be rounded.

entities.name: Rounding Type
entities.mention: Rounding Type: If either Half Day or Day is selected in the Rounding field, this field appears.

entities.name: No Rounding
entities.mention: No Rounding: Work entries are not modified.

entities.name: Half Day
entities.mention: Half Day: Work entries are rounded to the closest half day amount.

entities.name: Day
entities.mention: Day: Work entries are rounded to the closest full day amount.

entities.name: Up
entities.mention: Select either Up or Down to determine how the rounding is handled.

entities.name: Down
entities.mention: Select either Up or Down to determine how the rounding is handled.

entities.name: work entry
entities.mention: the time entered for the work entry

entities.name: working time
entities.mention: The working time is set to an 8-hour work day
